nodes.label: सुनीता की पहिया कुर्सी
nodes.description: Chapter 12 - An inspiring story about disability, courage, and determination

nodes.label: सुनीता (Sunita)
nodes.description: A brave girl who uses a wheelchair but never lets her disability hold her back

nodes.label: सुनीता के काम (Activities)
nodes.description: Goes to school, studies, plays with friends, and participates in all activities

nodes.label: पहिया कुर्सी (Wheelchair)
nodes.description: A chair with wheels that helps people who cannot walk to move independently

nodes.label: सहायक उपकरण (Assistive Devices)
nodes.description: Tools that help differently-abled people: wheelchairs, crutches, hearing aids, etc.

nodes.label: आत्मनिर्भरता (Independence)
nodes.description: The wheelchair gives Sunita freedom to move and do things on her own

nodes.label: मुख्य विषय (Main Themes)
nodes.description: The important lessons and values taught by this story

nodes.label: हिम्मत (Courage)
nodes.description: The bravery to face challenges and never give up despite difficulties

nodes.label: समानता (Equality)
nodes.description: Treating all people with equal respect regardless of physical ability

nodes.label: सहानुभूति (Empathy)
nodes.description: Understanding others' feelings without pitying them - respecting their dignity

nodes.label: सीख (Moral)
nodes.description: Disability does not mean inability - with courage and determination, anything is possible

nodes.label: भाषा कार्य (Language Skills)
nodes.description: Hindi vocabulary and comprehension skills from this chapter

nodes.label: नए शब्द (New Words)
nodes.description: विकलांगता, हिम्मत, आत्मविश्वास, सहानुभूति, प्रेरणा, दिव्यांग, सम्मान
